name: q3-pipeline-review
description: Pipeline filter on the user's own book by close date window.
input_message: What's in my pipeline for Q3? Show open opps closing in the next 90 days
expected_behavior: Resolves 'my' as USR-101 without asking. Calls opportunity-pipeline filtered by owner_user_id=USR-101, open_only, close_date between 2026-06-09 and 2026-09-07 (90 days). Groups by stage, sorts by close date ascending. Each row shows opp id, account, amount ($), probability (%), stage, close date, next step. Surfaces commit-eligible deals (Stage 4+) separately from earlier stages. Does NOT invent opps.
